# xUI

> xUI is an open-source collection of modern, interactive, themeable React + Tailwind CSS UI components. Copy, paste, and customize — every component ships as source you fully own. Built for Tailwind CSS v4 and React 19, installable via the shadcn CLI.
## For AI agents

- Full machine-readable component index: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/llms-full.txt
- Catalog JSON (name, category, files, deps): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/r/registry.json
- Any component's full source as JSON: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/r/{name}.json
- Install without human setup: `npx shadcn@latest add https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/r/{name}.json`

## Install

Components are distributed as a shadcn-compatible registry. Register the namespace once in your components.json:

```
{ "registries": { "@xui": "https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/r/{name}.json" } }
```

Then add any component:

```
npx shadcn@latest add @xui/card-02
```

Or use the full URL without setup:

```
npx shadcn@latest add https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/r/card-02.json
```

## Components

- AI Tooling (agent trace, model picker, usage dashboard, prompt library, diff review): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/ai
- Headers (SaaS, announcement, docs, e-commerce, glass floating — importable site headers): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/header
- Glass / macOS (control center, music player, notification stack, widgets, spotlight): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/glass
- Flow / motion (voice wave, logo marquee, word ribbon, card stream, breathing hero): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/flow
- Tables & data (data table, kanban, calendar, file browser, code diff): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/table
- Modals (confirm delete, share sheet, paywall, keyboard confirm, tour): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/modal
- Widgets (weather, world clock, habit heatmap, pomodoro, system status): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/widget
- Commerce (product card, cart, reviews, variant picker, order tracking): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/shop
- Media (music player, video controls, podcast list, gallery, waveform): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/media
- Status (presence, uptime, deploy pipeline, changelog, live activity): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/status
- AI Chat (chatbot panel, streaming response, prompt input, voice orb): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/chat
- Payment (3D credit card, checkout summary, transactions, pricing, usage meter): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/payment
- Navigation (glass navbar, pill nav, sidebar, dock, command palette): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/nav
- Inputs (OTP, file upload, filter search, tags, auth card): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/input
- Stats (KPI cards, activity rings, leaderboard): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/stat
- Notifications (notification center, toast stack): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/notification
- Testimonials (marquee wall, spotlight quote): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/testimonial
- Onboarding (setup checklist, wizard steps): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/onboarding
- User menu (profile dropdown): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/user
- Cards (incl. card-06, an interactive 3D portfolio card): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/card
- Buttons: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/button
- Alerts: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/alert
- Profiles: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/profile
- FAQ: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/faq
- Lists: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/list
- AI Input: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/input

## Hooks

- useAutoResizeTextarea: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/hooks/use-auto-resize-textarea

## Docs

- Installation & getting started: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs

## Tech

React 19, Next.js 16, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion, three.js / React Three Fiber, Radix UI, lucide-react.
